sentences.english: A new student joined our class today.
She looked nervous and didn't know where to sit.
sentences.korean: 긴장한 표정이었고 어디 앉아야 할지 몰랐어요.

sentences.english: I waved to her and said she could sit next to me.
sentences.korean: 손을 흔들며 내 옆에 앉아도 된다고 했어요.

sentences.english: During lunch I introduced her to my friends.
She smiled and said thank you for being so kind.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
